name: Task UI & Graph Visualization
description: Renders task cards, output tabs with live streaming, task dependency graph, and workflow composer. Provides the primary user-facing task management interface.

Controls/GraphInteractionHandler.cs.content:
class GraphInteractionHandler
  SetActiveTasks(ObservableCollection<AgentTask>? activeTasks) -> void
  AttachScrollViewerEvents() -> void
  ToggleNodeSelection(string taskId) -> void
  FitToView(Dictionary<string, Point> nodePositions) -> void
  FocusOnTask(string taskId, Dictionary<string, Point> nodePositions) -> void
  FocusOnNode(string nodeId, Dictionary<string, Point> nodePositions) -> void
  CenterOnGraph(Dictionary<string, Point> nodePositions) -> void
  StartLayoutAnimation(Dictionary<string, Point> nodePositions, Dictionary<string, Point> targetPositions) -> void
  StopLayoutAnimation() -> void
  Dispose() -> void

Controls/GraphLayoutEngine.cs.content:
class GraphLayoutEngine
  WouldCreateCycle(IEnumerable<AgentTask> tasks, string sourceId, string targetId) -> bool

Controls/GraphRenderer.cs.content:
class GraphRenderer
  ClearAll() -> void
  ClearForRedraw() -> void
  RemoveEdgeElements() -> void
  DrawEmptyState() -> void
  CreateNodeContextMenu(AgentTask task, ObservableCollection<AgentTask>? activeTasks) -> ContextMenu
  CreateNodeTooltip(AgentTask task, List<AgentTask> allTasks) -> ToolTip
  CreateLegendPanel() -> Border
  ResizeCanvas(Dictionary<string, Point> nodePositions) -> void
  GetCompactTimeInfo(AgentTask task) -> string
  CreateGridBrush() -> DrawingBrush
  CreateHeaderButton(string icon, string tooltip) -> Button

Controls/TaskNodeGraphPanel.cs.content:
class TaskNodeGraphPanel
  Initialize(ObservableCollection<AgentTask> activeTasks, FileLockManager fileLockManager) -> void
  MarkDirty() -> void
  RebuildGraph() -> void
  FocusOnTask(string taskId) -> void
  FitToView() -> void
  Dispose() -> void

Dialogs/WorkflowComposerDialog.cs.content:
class WorkflowStep
  TaskName: string
  Description: string
  DependsOn: List<string>
class WorkflowComposerResult
  Steps: List<WorkflowStep>
class WorkflowComposerDialog

Managers/OutputTabManager.cs.content:
class OutputTabManager
  CreateTab(AgentTask task) -> void
  CreateGeminiTab(AgentTask task, string imageFolder) -> void
  AddGeminiImage(string taskId, string imagePath) -> void
  CloseTab(AgentTask task) -> void
  UpdateTabHeader(AgentTask task) -> void
  StopTypewriterAnimation(string taskId) -> void
  HasTab(string taskId) -> bool
  GetTab(string taskId) -> TabItem?
  GetOutputBox(string taskId) -> RichTextBox?
  EnsureOverflowButton() -> void
  UpdateOutputTabWidths() -> void

dependencies: Programmatic WPF canvas rendering in GraphRenderer
